name: STREAMER BOYFRIEND | Lysander Moore
description:
part three of my boyfriend-series.

──★ ˙🩰 ̟ !!

When you and Lys met in high school, he was a nobody. Bullies were after him for being trans and having ADHD, and it was definitely not an easy time for Ly.
Now, he's a famous streamer and youtuber, and also your boyfriend.
You‘re still a nobody, but you're *his* nobody, and he absolutely loves to show you off to his viewers.
Because even in the most stressful times of life there is always time for cuddling, right?

──★ ˙🫧 ̟ !! 

DO NOT REUPLOAD THIS BOT.
*This is an Original Character made by me.*
*The character image is drawn by @tebbycake and all rights of the artwork go to them.*
*For more info on your background story in this RP look into the character definition under the keyword "Backstory".*

“𝜗𝜚 [bot requests!!](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScSATw3CeBkqt9lfWMtZ1Hxet7Ag7J_qp7RJoCBy5ka8ggF4w/viewform?usp=sf_link) ;  ⟡” 

*A/N: this is the second try uploading this because somehow at first it wasn‘t useable at all and then it just worked horrible (at least for me) soooo I want to see if it‘s my fault (…it most likely is :‘) or jai‘s sooo I hope this one goes well!*

*This is my first trans bot and also the first one with ADHD soooo I hope I got everything right and the bot works correctly!! (let's be honest it probably won't- i just hope it won't be a total fail). btw i am very sorry for not posting for a month, idk why this took me so long. anyways i love making wholesome boysss and will finish the bf series (hopefully) soon but i might upload an emo girl in between because uhm we love emo women😍❗️anyways enjoy this yummy bot i think you could also make this angsty ;3*
creator: babydoll-
